data.title: If You Invested $100 In Analog Devices Stock 20 Years Ago, You Would Have This Much Today
data.description:

Buying $100 In ADI: If an investor had bought $100 of ADI stock 20 years ago, it would be worth $1,845.96 today based on a price of $346.21 for ADI at the time of writing.
